CheckTitle: Detect applications with long-lived client secrets (over 1 year)
Description: Flags application registrations with password credentials that have an expiry longer than 365 days from their creation, or no expiry at all.
Risk: Long-lived secrets increase the window of opportunity for credential theft and misuse. Secrets that are valid for years may outlive the project or team that created them.

Remediation.Recommendation: Rotate application secrets to expire within 180 days. Prefer certificate-based credentials or managed identities where possible.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
